text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After class, I see Super Creek and Rice Shower
wearing costumes in the classroom...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I thought as much. Lowering the lights in the dorm would be dangerous. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, y-yes... I think so, too

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. ♪ We're making arrangements for
the Cross-Dorm Dare-Off. Rice and I make up the
executive committee.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We've finished with the costume fitting, so now
we're organizing the tests of courage.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Coming up with interesting ideas has been
surprisingly tough, though...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I don't think I'm very good with scary
stuff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's note down everything we've come up
with so far.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? That's a little odd. The lead's not coming
out of my mechanical pencil.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-well, I can make a memo on my phone so—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Why can't I turn it on?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... It's happening again! I've brought more bad
luck!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, Creek. I knew it was a bad idea to
have me on the Dare-Off Committee...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Don't say things like that. You haven't
done anything wrong.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's ghosts that are to blame for these mishaps! They saw our costumes, thought we were friends of theirs, and floated on over.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh? Ghosts? B-but those aren't...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There! Can't you feel it? I can sense a spook
getting closer as we speak...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swish...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eek! My leg! Is that... a ghost?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's actually just Super Creek brushing her tail
across Rice Shower's leg, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It seems like this ghost is partial to pranks, don't
you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like she wants me to play along. I'll try
shaking the desk without Rice Shower noticing it's
me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
AAH! The desk is shaking?! Wh-wh-what should
we do, Creek?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret, it's all right. I'll keep you safe and
sound.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Listen to me, you... silly spookster! Scaring Rice is
a big no-no!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...It's gone quiet. Did the ghost... leave?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yep! I've chased it right off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... wh-what if it comes back?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll chase it off again! As many times as I
have to. I'll keep you perfectly safe!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So don't you worry about it, and let's get on with
our committee meeting. Okay, Rice? ♪
choice_data_list: I think you'll both do fine!
I think you'll both do fine!

If you get spooked again, you can let Creek
look after you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
So don't you worry about it, and let's get on with
our committee meeting. Okay, Rice? ♪
choice_data_list: I think you'll both do fine!
I think you'll both do fine!

If you get spooked again, you can let Creek
look after you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Just leave everything to this Mummy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Um, I tend to get frightened easily, so I'm not
sure I'll be able to perform my duties too well,
but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll try my very best to make sure the Dare-Off is
fun for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. I know you can do it, Rice. You
already overcame your fears today. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, they both go on to have an amazing
exchange of ideas, making for a very successful
planning meeting!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'll coddle you good and proper. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, a-actually, I'm still a little... frightened, so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there. Don't you worry now. "Mummy" is
right here with you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, and I'm happy to coddle you as well,
Trainer. That's what "mummies" are for, after
all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Dare-Off planning meeting continues
with Super Creek providing copious amounts of
coddling.
